summary: Wait for rx-demo app workloads to become available.
command: k3s kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/api-gateway --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/legacy-sync-worker --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/read-model-projection --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-demo rollout status deploy/rx-ui --timeout=240s && k3s kubectl -n rx-demo get pods -o wide
expected: API, UI, workers, dependencies, and loadgen are running or complete as appropriate.
